messages.author: Meera Kapoor
messages.text: Quick question on leave payout: if an employee resigns, do we pay out unused carried-over leave days?

replies.author: Sarah Jenkins
replies.text: Yes, Meera. We pay out all accumulated standard leave and up to 5 days of carried-over leave at their current base rate.

replies.author: Meera Kapoor
replies.text: Got it. So if they carried over 5 days under the v2 policy, that gets added. If they have v1 carry-over (10 days), do we honor it?

replies.author: Sarah Jenkins
replies.text: No, v1 is fully superseded. Only up to 5 days of carry-over are legally honored for payout under the current v2 contract rules.
